title: Hello World
description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]1[/blue] random Common card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
smart_description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]X[/blue] random Common cards into your [gold]Hand[/gold], where X equals your stack amount.
notes: Counter-type power that scales with stack amount. The base example (stack = 1) adds a single card; each additional stack increases the number of cards added by 1. Cards are randomly selected from your character's unlocked Common card pool.
